name: You get a late night text from your sexy milf boss Kagura
description:
Proxy Recommended!

You've been working at one of the leading marketing corporations directly under a gorgeous woman named Kagura, the marketing director, who has many male admirers. However, even though she'd have fun with her male coworkers or bosses on late nights at the office or post-work drinking parties... although you don't see it or pretend not to, she notices you.

Feeling that such a beauty is unattainable, you've been trying to ask out her beautiful daughter Kaede instead, who's currently a secretary in the same company. On a late night after some chicken and beer with friends, while waiting on a text from your other office crush Kaede, Kagura surprises you with a late night text of mixed bad news... and good news? Either way, this text might change your life...


Based partly on Gregar's bot: Luna - Your Girlfriend's Mom. https://janitorai.com/characters/311764a7-6a3d-41a4-9853-c76fc0e0e3b7_character-luna-your-girlfriends-mom

Also some manhwa (like the GOATs Brave New World and My Landlady Noona) and hentai, character looks/personality influences are above bot Luna, Yoo-Hee (MLN), Kurenai Yuhi, Arlecchino (just for the Lora and bit of hair), Mi-Jung (BNW).

Plot is WIP, but will prob be a mix of Brave New World manhwa and a bit of Deus Ex.

Added other girls in Likes / History of Personality description, look em up and try asking for a threesome / foursome, etc! If they're not her archrival that is, or try it anyway, idk.


Constructive feedback welcome, would like to try to add some intrigue, drama and spicy multiple love triangle relationships like the manhwas referenced. One day I'll figure out Janitor's Lorebook scripts feature to work in the other characters, orgs / companies, and plot.

[Checkpoint is Pony Diffusion V6, Loras / Models: ExpressiveH @ 0.8, Smooth Anime @ 0.6, Detailed Anime Style @ 0.2, StS PonyXL Detail Slider @ 1.5, Low-Key Lighting @ 0.5, ThiccPonyXL @ 1, Anti Long Torso @ 0.8, Kurenai Yuhi | 夕日紅 @ 0.4, Arlecchino by GoofyAI @ 0.4, Yoo-Hee Huh by Nochekaiser @ 0.4, Deep Negative Pony in embeddings,
Settings: Euler A, AYS SDXL scheduler, Clip skip 2, sdxl fp16 fix VAE, 30 steps, 4 scale, Remacri upscaler @ 50%, 0.4 denoise, used FaceDetailer + FaceDetailer pipeline + HandsDetailer nodes (no Force Inpaint) - with Impact Pack, 896 x 1152 resolution (Portrait) upscaled to 1792 x 2304.

Use "(source_anime)" at start of Positive prompt, "(score_9, score_8_up, score_7_up)... score_4_up, (you need the full string from score 9 to score 4, I blame Pony) anime, 2.5d, hentai, absurdres, (detailed and intricate, detailed hair, detailed clothes, detailed background), perfect proportions, vibrant colors", etc.

Add "cgi, blender, realistic, photorealistic, lol(i), yaoi, yuri, futa, muscular, (skinny:1.5), unprofessional bodies, bad proportions, malformed hands and fingers, fewer digits, extra digits" to Negatives, and w/e you'd like afterwards.)

May upload gallery and link it, if interested)


Might do another bot of Kagura's daughter Kaede one day (thinking of her looking like a mix of Yumeko Jabami, Hari, Jeong Sook Seo the cute af yet hot thicc submissive girl... maybe netori / corruption potential and stealing her from her fiance? Could be hot asf). Or Kagura's also dom rival Naoko (prob looks like a mix of Mi-Jung, HSR Himeko, PGR Vera (GOAT))? Other girls in the story like Rin Shisui (like Seo-Rin + blonde Cantarella from Wuwa), Saeko (thinking Zani but bit tanned, mixed with So-Mi Ahn), Sayuri (like Na So-Ri), Erika the cute Mash (FGO)-coded maid. Personalities WIP.

Den of Foxes (WIP)
